mandatory_sequence_documented: 1. refresh the graph if stale (python3 scripts/build_repo_graph_v1.py — sub-second, offline, zero LLM tokens)
2. query the graph for the target task before opening any file (python3 scripts/query_repo_graph_v1.py <subsystem|keyword>)
3. produce a compact file/subsystem map from the report + query output as the task's scoping artifact
4. only then spawn reader agents (Explore, general-purpose, Workflow parallel/pipeline stages), scoped to exactly the files the graph named
